metadata.description: Lazy-loaded MCP tool surface for Claude Code: discover, search, and call tools across many MCP servers without loading every schema upfront. Hybrid BM25 + multilingual embedding rerank, OAuth 2.1 (PKCE+DCR), encrypted token storage, audit receipts. Wraps the mcx CLI.

plugins.name: mcx
plugins.description: Slash commands and a routing skill that drive the mcx CLI. Requires the mcx CLI installed separately (run /mcx-install if missing).
